title: Auto-Generated — Do Not Edit

# DO NOT EDIT THIS DIRECTORY

The files in this directory are **auto-generated** by the `irongate-server` CI pipeline.

**Source:** `src/_generated/openapi.json` (fetched from `irongate-server`)
**Generator:** `irongate-docs/scripts/generate-api-docs.ts`
**Trigger:** Every push to `main` in `irongate-server` that changes the OpenAPI spec

Any file you create or edit here will be **overwritten** on the next CI run.

To make changes to API reference content, edit the Fastify route schemas
in `irongate-server/apps/server/src/routes/` and push to main.
